testIds: Session Lifecycle > e2e:session-create - Session create UI is accessible
Session Lifecycle > e2e:session-pause - Pre-seeded paused sessions are visible
Session Lifecycle > e2e:session-resume - Session status filter works
Session Lifecycle > e2e:session-delete - Session management page loads
sessionsSlice > setSessions > replaces all sessions (setAll semantics)
sessionsSlice > upsertSession > inserts a new session when id is not present
sessionsSlice > removeSession > removes the session with the matching id
